item.title: Fixing the Big Lathe
item.description: The shop’s giant lathe needs attention. What repairs keep this powerhouse running at peak precision?

media:content.media:title: Fixing the Big Lathe
media:content.media:description: The shop’s giant lathe needs attention. What repairs keep this powerhouse running at peak precision?

item.title: Shop-Made Drawbar Bolt Upgrade
item.description: Strength and reliability matter. How does a custom drawbar bolt upgrade improve performance in the big lathe?

media:content.media:title: Shop-Made Drawbar Bolt Upgrade
media:content.media:description: Strength and reliability matter. How does a custom drawbar bolt upgrade improve performance in the big lathe?

item.title: Inspecting a Damaged Hydraulic Cylinder
item.description: A cylinder shows signs of serious wear. What inspection reveals the extent of the damage—and the repair path forward?

media:content.media:title: Inspecting a Damaged Hydraulic Cylinder
media:content.media:description: A cylinder shows signs of serious wear. What inspection reveals the extent of the damage—and the repair path forward?

item.title: Machining a 1045 hollow bar for Megabore
item.description: Heavy steel meets precision machining. How does the team shape a 1045 hollow bar for the massive Megabore lathe?

media:content.media:title: Machining a 1045 hollow bar for Megabore
media:content.media:description: Heavy steel meets precision machining. How does the team shape a 1045 hollow bar for the massive Megabore lathe?

item.title: Shop-Made Rotary Ground Clamp
item.description: When off‑the‑shelf won’t cut it, the team builds their own rotary ground clamp. What makes this design unique?

media:content.media:title: Shop-Made Rotary Ground Clamp
media:content.media:description: When off‑the‑shelf won’t cut it, the team builds their own rotary ground clamp. What makes this design unique?

item.title: Repairing a Caterpillar D10 Equalizer Bar
item.description: A worn equalizer bar gets new life in the shop. What precision work brings this CAT part back to spec?

media:content.media:title: Repairing a Caterpillar D10 Equalizer Bar
media:content.media:description: A worn equalizer bar gets new life in the shop. What precision work brings this CAT part back to spec?

item.title: Tailstock chuck build reaches the finish
item.description: After countless hours of machining, the custom tailstock chuck is complete. What final steps sealed the build?

media:content.media:title: Tailstock chuck build reaches the finish
media:content.media:description: After countless hours of machining, the custom tailstock chuck is complete. What final steps sealed the build?

item.title: Honing with the Sunnen HTA-4100
item.description: Cutting Edge Engineering Australia showcases the Sunnen HTA-4100 machine in action.

media:content.media:title: Honing with the Sunnen HTA-4100
media:content.media:description: Cutting Edge Engineering Australia showcases the Sunnen HTA-4100 machine in action.

item.title: When You Think You’ve Reassembled Everything Correctly…
item.description: Reassembly doesn’t always go as planned. This clip captures the moment when confidence meets reality in the workshop.

media:content.media:title: When You Think You’ve Reassembled Everything Correctly…
media:content.media:description: Reassembly doesn’t always go as planned. This clip captures the moment when confidence meets reality in the workshop.

item.title: DIY Through‑Spindle Coolant Drawbar Bolt
item.description: Innovation meets necessity with a shop‑made through‑spindle coolant drawbar bolt. A DIY solution for better machining performance.

media:content.media:title: DIY Through‑Spindle Coolant Drawbar Bolt
media:content.media:description: Innovation meets necessity with a shop‑made through‑spindle coolant drawbar bolt. A DIY solution for better machining performance.

item.title: Saving This Cylinder Might Be a Challenge
item.description: A damaged cylinder arrives in the shop. Can careful machining and repair bring it back to service, or is it beyond saving?

media:content.media:title: Saving This Cylinder Might Be a Challenge
media:content.media:description: A damaged cylinder arrives in the shop. Can careful machining and repair bring it back to service, or is it beyond saving?

item.title: Franna Crane Project — Even More Issues to Solve!
item.description: The Franna crane project continues, uncovering new challenges at every step. Fabrication, machining, and problem‑solving keep the build moving forward.

media:content.media:title: Franna Crane Project — Even More Issues to Solve!
media:content.media:description: The Franna crane project continues, uncovering new challenges at every step. Fabrication, machining, and problem‑solving keep the build moving forward.

item.title: Building a Serious Revolving Tailstock Chuck
item.description: A lathe this big needs a custom revolving tailstock chuck. With no off‑the‑shelf option, we start by unpacking the 4‑jaw chuck to see if it fits the build.

media:content.media:title: Building a Serious Revolving Tailstock Chuck
media:content.media:description: A lathe this big needs a custom revolving tailstock chuck. With no off‑the‑shelf option, we start by unpacking the 4‑jaw chuck to see if it fits the build.

item.title: Making a Replacement Gear Selector Fork for the Lathe
item.description: When Kurtis broke the lathe’s gear selector fork, the solution was clear — machine a brand‑new one from scratch.

media:content.media:title: Making a Replacement Gear Selector Fork for the Lathe
media:content.media:description: When Kurtis broke the lathe’s gear selector fork, the solution was clear — machine a brand‑new one from scratch.

item.title: This 8‑Tonne Forklift Has Worn‑Out Bushings
item.description: Heavy loads take their toll. This forklift’s worn‑out bushings demand machining and replacement to restore strength and reliability.

media:content.media:title: This 8‑Tonne Forklift Has Worn‑Out Bushings
media:content.media:description: Heavy loads take their toll. This forklift’s worn‑out bushings demand machining and replacement to restore strength and reliability.
